name: Honyaku Center Inc.
summary: Honyaku Center Inc. provides translation services in Japan and internationally. It offers translation for patent documents comprising application-related, court-related, and others; and medical documents, including basic research/non-clinical development, clinical development, regulatory submission, and post-marketing. The company also provides financial and legal translations comprising performance disclosure materials related, and corporate and other documents; and translation services for IT related documents and manuals, and game-comics-related documents. In addition, it offers translation of industrial documents, such as R&D, planning, and design documents; production, quality assurance, implementation, and maintenance service documents; sales and marketing documents; and non-manufacturing industry related documents. Further, the company provides medical writing, grammar check, transcription, staffing, multilingual contact center, and foreign patent application services, as well as services related to computer games, e-learning, and Websites; and prepares drawings. Additionally, it offers translation services for documents required to apply for marriage, work, residency, study abroad, and other visas; and DTP, printing, document, and e-book translation related services, as well as press releases and newsletters, and presentation documents. The company serves clients in a range of industries, such as automotive, machinery, electronics, medical and pharmaceutical, patent, legal, accounting, government, education, R&D, and others. Honyaku Center Inc. was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
